meta.description: Triggered by VNTANA webhook when a product is sent for review. Downloads the product GLB using the VNTANA native node, parses the scene tree, stores the mapping as a JSON attachment, and sends a Slack notification with a link to the parts-mapper UI.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, productUuid: $node['Build Notification'].json.productUuid, productName: $node['Build Notification'].json.productName, totalMeshes: $node['Build Notification'].json.totalMeshes, needsRename: $node['Build Notification'].json.needsRename, mapperUrl: $node['Build Notification'].json.mapperUrl }) }}
